case_title: FELIPE DA CRUZ VS. BRYAN SILLOREQUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DA CRUZ, FELIPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED JUL-31-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $738.00 FILED BY DA CRUZ, FELIPE AS TO DEFENDANT SILLOREQUEZ, BRYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
